name: GET /api/v1/health/ready
statusMessage: 1. Test Case ID: 8wtNI7  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 5xx  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready  2. Test Case ID: nvF5op  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/ready` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready
